examples: Being from a large, poor family, he learned to live without.
We've run out of bread; you'll have to do without until I can get to the bakeshop.

definitions.text: Not having, containing, characteristic of, etc.
examples: It was a mistake to leave my house without a coat.
I was without formal education but was well read and articulate.

definitions.text: Not doing or not having done something.
examples: He likes to eat everything without sharing.
